title: Items 40-43 UKG Pro Payroll Modernization -- Council Hesitation and Forward Vote
summary: Councilor Williams introduces items 40-43 (Mosaic Consulting/UKG Pro payroll modernization) and delivers public statement acknowledging months of council concern about allocating additional funds. States council is 'at a point that we need to move forward' and hopes the administration can 'prove us wrong.' Items pass unanimously after extended disruption forced adjournment and constituent removal.
raw_content:
[00:39:50] one more time.
[00:39:50] >> Thank you, Madam President. I have items
[00:39:52] 40 through 43. I would like to introduce
[00:39:54] nurse their adoption.
[00:39:56] >> Item 40. Any discussion?
[00:39:59] >> Yes, madam president.
[00:40:01] >> Um the payroll modernization project has
[00:40:05] been on our agenda since late last year.
[00:40:09] Um, it's clearly been something that
[00:40:14] our city has had a challenge with. Uh,
[00:40:16] the common council over the past couple
[00:40:17] months, we have expressed our concern
[00:40:20] and our hesitation with allocating
[00:40:23] additional funds to the process. Um,
[00:40:25] however, we are at a point that we need
[00:40:28] to move forward. Um, it is my hope that
[00:40:33] the administration can prove us wrong.
[00:40:37] um that we're able to move forward and
[00:40:38] and complete this process and that we
[00:40:41] can put all these concerns to rest and
[00:40:43] be able to um you [clears throat] know
[00:40:46] get to the the finish line that we all
[00:40:47] know we need to reach. And so you know
[00:40:49] thank you to the team spearheading that
[00:40:51] effort and
[00:40:53] let's move forward.
[00:40:56] >> Thank you. Please call the role.
[00:40:59] >> All in favor?
[00:40:59] >> Is there any other discussion
[00:41:01] >> more discussion? Nope. [clears throat]
[00:41:02] Okay.
[00:41:02] >> All in favor?

political_signal.description: Councilor Williams publicly signals council's reservations about payroll modernization spending while voting to proceed, putting administration on notice to deliver results

processing_notes: Connects to qUjV1ZYa2nY Finance Committee Feb 3 where payroll modernization was discussed in detail. Williams' statement is notable -- expresses hope administration 'proves us wrong.' UKG Pro contract is with Mosaic Consulting Group (RFP #25-266), 18-month implementation.
Segment 11 of 12 from Common Council Regular Meeting, Monday, February 9th, 2026
Transcript corrections applied: Sharon Owens -> Sharon F. Owens
